targeted.description: Narrow breadth + Shallow depth: Find specific fact or answer

focused_deep.description: Narrow breadth + Deep depth: Detailed explanation of single topic

survey.description: Broad breadth + Shallow depth: List/enumerate many aspects

comprehensive.description: Broad breadth + Deep depth: Detailed analysis of many aspects

findall_breadth.description: Maximum breadth: 3 searches × 15 results, batch extraction

extraction.description: Structured data extraction: Deep content + parallel processing + Gemini 3 synthesis

deepseek.description: Default provider using Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite for extraction, DeepSeek for synthesis
deepseek._note_backup: BACKUP VALUES — 'synthesis' in each tier and 'default_extraction_model' are used only if model_config.csv is unavailable. At runtime, model_role / default_extraction_model_role resolve the actual models from model_config.csv. Edit the CSV to change models.

tier1.label: Fast
tier1.description: Fast, cost-effective synthesis for simple queries

tier2.label: Balanced
tier2.description: Balanced synthesis with DeepSeek → Sonnet → Opus fallback chain

tier3.label: Strong
tier3.description: Explicit upgrade to Claude Sonnet for complex reasoning

tier4.label: Deepest
tier4.description: Maximum capability - Opus for hardest problems (auto-upgrade tier)

claude.description: Gemini extraction + Claude synthesis for speed and reliability
claude._note_backup: BACKUP VALUES — 'synthesis' in each tier and 'default_extraction_model' are used only if model_config.csv is unavailable. At runtime, model_role / default_extraction_model_role resolve the actual models from model_config.csv. Edit the CSV to change models.

baseten.description: Gemini extraction + Baseten DeepSeek synthesis for speed
baseten._note_backup: BACKUP VALUES — 'synthesis' in each tier and 'default_extraction_model' are used only if model_config.csv is unavailable. At runtime, model_role / default_extraction_model_role resolve the actual models from model_config.csv. Edit the CSV to change models.

kimi.description: Gemini extraction + Kimi K2.5 synthesis via OpenRouter
kimi._note_backup: BACKUP VALUES — 'synthesis' in each tier and 'default_extraction_model' are used only if model_config.csv is unavailable. At runtime, model_role / default_extraction_model_role resolve the actual models from model_config.csv. Edit the CSV to change models.

tier3.label: Strong
tier3.description: Strong reasoning - falls back to Claude Sonnet

tier4.label: Deepest
tier4.description: Deepest analysis - falls back to Claude Opus

flash.description: Gemini 3 Flash (Google AI Studio) synthesis — high thinking, web-grounded via Perplexity
flash._note_backup: BACKUP VALUES — 'synthesis' in each tier and 'default_extraction_model' are used only if model_config.csv is unavailable. At runtime, model_role / default_extraction_model_role resolve the actual models from model_config.csv. Edit the CSV to change models.

tier1.label: Fast
tier1.description: Fast synthesis via Gemini 3 Flash low-thinking (AI Studio → OpenRouter)

tier2.label: Balanced
tier2.description: Medium-thinking synthesis via Gemini 3 Flash (AI Studio → OpenRouter)

tier3.label: Strong
tier3.description: Strong reasoning fallback via Claude Sonnet

tier4.label: Deepest
tier4.description: Maximum capability fallback via Claude Opus
